parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: An OData filter expression that describes a subset of usages to return. The supported parameter is name.value (name of the metric, can have an or of multiple names).

AllowedDomain.description: An allowed domain for Bing Custom Search configuration.

domain.description: A domain string that can be used to specify allowed, blocked, or pinned domains in Bing Custom Search configuration.

includeSubPages.description: A flag to indicate whether subpages of the allowed domain should be included in the search result. If set to true (default), all subpages and nested paths under the specified domain will be included in the search result. If set to false, only the main domain will be included in the search result, excluding any subpages.

boostLevel.description: The boost level for the allowed domain.

timeGrain.description: The time grain of the availability.

nextLink.description:
URL client should use to fetch the next page (per server side paging).
It's null for now, added for future use.

BingAccount.description: Bing Account is an Azure resource representing the provisioned account, its type, location and SKU.

kind.description: Required. Indicates the type of Bing account.

tags.description: Gets or sets a list of key-value pairs that describe the resource. These tags can be used in viewing and grouping this resource (across resource groups). A maximum of 15 tags can be provided for a resource. Each tag must have a key no greater than 128 characters and value no greater than 256 characters.

BingAccountEnumerateSkusResult.description: The list of Bing accounts operation response.

value.description: Gets the list of Bing accounts and their properties.

BingAccountKeys.description: The access keys for the Bing account.

BingAccountListResult.description: The response of a BingAccount list operation.

value.description: The BingAccount items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

provisioningState.description: Gets the status of the Bing account at the time the operation was called.

statisticsEnabled.description: (Bing Search Only) A flag indicating whether Bing Statistics is enabled.

BlockedDomain.description: A blocked domain for Bing Custom Search configuration.

domain.description: A domain string that can be used to specify allowed, blocked, or pinned domains in Bing Custom Search configuration.

includeSubPages.description: A flag to indicate whether subpages of the blocked domain should be excluded from search results. If set to true (default), all subpages and nested paths under the specified domain will be excluded from search results. If set to false, only the main domain will be excluded from search results.

CheckSkuAvailabilityParameter.description: The SKUs to check for availability in the specified subscription and location

kind.description: Required. Indicates the type of Bing account.
Required. Indicates the type of Bing account.

skuAvailable.description: Indicates the given SKU is available or not.

reason.description: Reason why the SKU is not available.

CustomConfigurationProperties.description: Properties of Bing Custom Search Configuration.

allowedDomains.description: List of allowed domains for Bing Custom Search configuration. Total number of domains in Allowed List, Blocked List, and Pinned List combined cannot exceed 250.

blockedDomains.description: List of blocked domains for Bing Custom Search configuration. Total number of domains in Allowed List, Blocked List, and Pinned List combined cannot exceed 250.

pinnedDomains.description: List of pinned domains for Bing Custom Search configuration. Total number of domains in Allowed List, Blocked List, and Pinned List combined cannot exceed 250.

provisioningState.description: Gets the status of the Bing Custom Search configuration at the time the operation was called.

CustomSearchConfiguration.description: Bing Custom Search Configuration is an Azure resource representing Bing Custom Search configuration type, allowed domains, blocked domains and pinned domains.

properties.description: Properties of Bing Custom Search configuration.

CustomSearchConfigurationListResult.description: The response of a CustomSearchConfiguration list operation.

value.description: The CustomSearchConfiguration items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

LogSpecification.description: Specifications of the Log for Azure Monitoring

displayName.description: Localized friendly display name of the log

MetricDimension.description: Specifications of the Dimension of metrics

displayName.description: Localized friendly display name of the dimension

localizedValue.description: The friendly name of the metric.

MetricSpecification.description: Specifications of the Metrics for Azure Monitoring

displayName.description: Localized friendly display name of the metric

displayDescription.description: Localized friendly description of the metric

unit.description: Unit that makes sense for the metric

category.description: Name of the metric category that the metric belongs to. A metric can only belong to a single category.

aggregationType.description: Only provide one value for this field. Valid values: Average, Minimum, Maximum, Total, Count.

fillGapWithZero.description: Optional. If set to true, then zero will be returned for time duration where no metric is emitted/published.

isDataAction.description: Indicates whether the operation is a data action

operation.description: Localized friendly name for the operation

description.description: Localized friendly description for the operation

PinnedDomain.description: A pinned domain for Bing Custom Search configuration.

domain.description: A domain string that can be used to specify allowed, blocked, or pinned domains in Bing Custom Search configuration.

query.description: The search terms or keywords that trigger the pinned domain to appear at the top of the search results if the user's search query meets the condition specified.

condition.description: Defines how the query terms should match the search terms entered by the user. If set to Exact (default), the pinned domain appears only if the user's search query exactly matches the specified query. If set to StartsWith, the pinned domain appears if the user's search query starts with the specified query. If set to Contains, the pinned domain appears if the user's search query contains the specified query. If set to EndsWith, the pinned domain appears if the user's search query ends with the specified query.

ProvisioningState.description: Gets the status of the Bing Custom Search configuration at the time the operation was called.

resourceType.description: The type of resource the SKU applies to.

tier.description: Specifies the tier of Bing account.

kind.description: The Kind of resources that are supported in this SKU.

locations.description: The set of locations that the SKU is available.

locationInfo.description: A list of locations and availability zones in those locations where the SKU is available.

restrictions.description: The restrictions because of which SKU cannot be used. This is empty if there are no restrictions.

zones.description: List of availability zones where the SKU is supported.

zoneDetails.description: Details of capabilities available to a SKU in specific zones.

ResourceSkuRestrictionInfo.description: Information about the restriction where the SKU cannot be used.

locations.description: Locations where the SKU is restricted

zones.description: List of availability zones where the SKU is restricted.

values.description: The value of restrictions. If the restriction type is set to location. This would be different locations where the SKU is restricted.

restrictionInfo.description: Information about the restriction where the SKU cannot be used.

ResourceSkuZoneDetails.description: Describes The zonal capabilities of a SKU.

name.description: The set of zones that the SKU is available in with the specified capabilities.

capabilities.description: A list of capabilities that are available for the SKU in the specified list of zones.

value.description: The ResourceSku items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

metricSpecifications.description: Specifications of the Metrics for Azure Monitoring

Sku.description: The SKU of the Bing account.

name.description: Gets or sets the SKU name. Required for account creation, optional for update.

tier.description: Gets the SKU tier. This is based on the SKU name.

SkuCapability.description: SkuCapability indicates the capability of a certain feature.

SkuTier.description: Gets the SKU tier. This is based on the SKU name.

Usage.description: The usage data for a usage request.

name.description: The name information for the metric.

quotaPeriod.description: The quota period used to summarize the usage values.

nextResetTime.description: Next reset time for current quota.

UsagesResult.description: The response to a list usage request.

value.description: The list of usages for bing account.
